name: @peerads/web
description: PeerAds Web SDK — unified ad mediation + peer promotion for web apps

ad-networks.admob: Google Publisher Tags loaded dynamically — no npm package needed
ad-networks.applovin: AppLovin Exchange JS tag loaded dynamically — no npm package needed
ad-networks.unity: Unity Ads JS SDK loaded dynamically — no npm package needed
ad-networks.meta: Meta Audience Network has no web SDK — served via iframe ad tag
ad-networks.ironsource: IronSource is mobile-only — stubbed with no-op on web
